archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for Dark Tactical Dashboard)

surfaces_and_containers.cards: bg-[#0B1120] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_containers.glass_header: bg-[#050814]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_containers.inputs: bg-[#050814] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3D7A5F] focus:border-transparent transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-[#3D7A5F] hover:bg-[#4F9B7A] text-white font-bold tracking-wide rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(61,122,95,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 text-white font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-xl px-6 py-3

layout.grid_system: Control Room Protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Highly dense but breathable.
layout.spacing: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8). Keep a minimum of gap-6 between structural sections.

components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width 1.5 for a clean premium look.
components_instructions.stats_dashboard: Top row bento-style stats cards. Use glass-like subtle borders, large Raleway numbers, and Jost labels.
components_instructions.page_1_trend_explorer: Bento Grid for niches. Top search bar with dark UI styling. Heat level badges with glowing dots. Filter toggles.
components_instructions.page_2_design_generator: Show selected niche context. Left: mockups (use absolute positioning for design overlay on the blank mockup). Right: configuration panel + 'Generate Designs' CTA that triggers a skeleton loading grid.
components_instructions.page_3_approve_push: Split view: Design preview on left, deeply editable SEO metadata and Pricing settings on right. Show the original/discount pricing logic. 'Approve & Push' and 'Reject' actions prominently.
components_instructions.settings_page: Clean settings cards for Printify API Key, Shop ID, global discount code, and base margins. Fields should look like secure inputs.
components_instructions.sidebar_log: A narrow right-side or collapsible drawer showing previously pushed products in a sleek list.

testing.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs, toggles, heat-filters) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, describing its role.

development_rules.fonts_installation: Add Google Fonts link for Raleway and Jost in index.html.
development_rules.config_file: Store pricing, margins, API endpoints, and dummy AI endpoints in a centralized config.js file as requested by the user.
